visual_description: Three young men in dark school uniforms stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room. The man in the center, with platinum blonde hair, holds a wand forward with a confident expression, flanked by two other men who also point their wands forward. The background is filled with dark, indistinct objects, suggesting a storage or workshop area.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, conversational tone, followed by a brief, low-frequency hum.
